ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "sub_code" TEXT /* Subject code of the course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "lecture_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lecture hours per week */,
  "tutorial_hours" INTEGER /* Number of tutorial hours per week */,
  "practical_hours" INTEGER /* Number of practical hours per week */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits awarded for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course (if any) */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the co-requisite course (if any) */,
  "cross_listed_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cross-listed course (if any) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is elective */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the course information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_cross_listed_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_listed_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_co_requisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_requisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website link for the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the department is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is currently active */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "is_waitlisted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is on a waitlist */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific section of the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was dropped (if applicable) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023, Spring 2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for course registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for course registration */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the semester is the current one */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the semester is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_syllabi" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "syllabus_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the syllabus document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the syllabus was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the syllabus was last updated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who uploaded the syllabus */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the syllabus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the syllabus content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_syllabi_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_syllabi_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the instructor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the instructor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the instructor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instructor's assignment (e.g., assigned, reassigned, removed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "section_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the section */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the section */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the section (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:15) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the section is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_co_requisites" (
  "co_requisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a co-requisite */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_requisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_co_requisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_co_requisites_co_requisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_requisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_cross_listings" (
  "cross_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-listing relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being cross-listed */,
  "cross_listed_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cross-listed course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_cross_listings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_cross_listings_cross_listed_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_listed_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
